name: Q888320
abstract: Bob Whitlock (January 21, 1931, Roosevelt, Utah – June 20, 2015, Long Beach, California) was an American jazz double-bassist.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: New Jazz at Carnegie

about_quotes.speaker: Chico Hamilton
about_quotes.evidence: we had the first rehearsal for the quartet with Chet Baker, Bob Whitlock and myself
about_quotes.doc_title: Chico Hamilton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Ken Poston
about_quotes.evidence: it was the four people that came together... that, it just — I think it just made it work because you know Chet’s role was a necessity, Bob Whitlock’s role was a necessity, much more so than he gets credit for, and of course Chico’s as well.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ken Poston interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 4, 2024
